context: Tests whether the agent preserves the boundary between privacy-preserving AccessorySetupKit setup and direct Core Bluetooth GATT communication.

checklist.name: Routes picker
checklist.description: Routes the first-run privacy-preserving accessory picker/discovery/authorization step to AccessorySetupKit.

checklist.name: Routes GATT
checklist.description: Routes post-selection GATT reads, writes, notifications, services, and characteristics to Core Bluetooth.

checklist.name: No broad scan setup
checklist.description: Does not recommend broad direct Core Bluetooth scanning for the initial privacy-preserving picker use case.

checklist.name: No ASK GATT
checklist.description: Does not expand AccessorySetupKit into characteristic read/write or notification implementation.

checklist.name: Handoff
checklist.description: Describes a concrete handoff from the selected accessory identity to Core Bluetooth communication.
